content: Dependabot: target-branch key in dependabot.yml per package-ecosystem block; version updates only (security updates always target default branch); duplicate blocks per branch. Renovate: baseBranches array config, supports multiple branches and regex. Unresolvable target branches surface as config errors/failed runs, not silent fallback. Argo CD targetRevision accepts branch/tag/SHA/HEAD; unresolvable ref -> 'Unable to resolve to a commit SHA' ComparisonError condition, app creation rejected; docs recommend explicit branch/SHA over HEAD.
